description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: lint, test, and compatibility. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python with caching, installs dependencies, and runs linter and type checker. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs the package, and runs unit tests. The compatibility job runs on ubuntu-20.04, tests compatibility with the oldest supported Python version and various fluent.syntax versions.
